nodes.name: Eremomela
nodes.summary: Eremomela（Eremomela）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Yellow-vented eremomela、Yellow-bellied eremomela、Senegal eremomela等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-crowned eremomela
nodes.summary: The rufous-crowned eremomela (Eremomela badiceps) is a species of bird formerly placed in the "Old World warbler" assemblage, but now placed in the family Cisticolidae. It is found throughout the African tropical rainforest. References
